case_title: SUNG HWANG VS. IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,689.95 FILED BY HWANG, SUNG AS TO DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-11-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SUNG HWANG AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE FRANCISCO LIRA, PORTFOLIO MANAGER FOR IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, LLC. ANJANI BHARGAVA, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. FELTON HOPKINS AND DESEJE BATI, FACILITY MANAGER & PARKING ATTENDANT FOR DEFENDANT, WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. BUT MR. LIRA WAIVES SERVICE OF THE COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. IF NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE MATTER WITH PREJUDICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES AND ORDER OF COURT AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 7/14/16. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SUNG HWANG OR DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, LLC. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
